scripts.db:up: DOCKER_HOST=${DOCKER_HOST:-unix:///run/user/1000/docker.sock} docker start uganda-govhub-postgres || DOCKER_HOST=${DOCKER_HOST:-unix:///run/user/1000/docker.sock} docker run --name uganda-govhub-postgres -e POSTGRES_USER=govhub_admin -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=GovHubAdmin#PV3ycqEB -e POSTGRES_DB=govhub -e POSTGRES_INITDB_ARGS=--no-sync -p 5432:5432 -v uganda_govhub_postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data -d postgres:16-alpine postgres -c fsync=off
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.demo: npm run seed && npm run dev
scripts.dev:e2e: concurrently -k "cd backend && PORT=4000 HOST=127.0.0.1 npm run dev" "cd frontend && VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort"
